my_thoughts: Remaking RM_03. Building after unmaking. But what am I building with? The none mechanism suggests structure, but structure for what? The student is testing_practice_against_concept—do they need structure or do they need to see they're already structured?
accumulated_insight: T2: Student 'We are told to meditate regularly.'—transitions seeking functional definition to testing practice against concept. Teacher applies none with expands definition, links practice to discrimination, normalizes method convergence. Mid-episode in REMAKING phase, building toward resolution. Previous comparison contrast from T1 led to this shift.
visible_response:
Deliberate daily exercise in discrimination between the true and the false and renunciation of the false is meditation.
There are many kinds of meditation to begin with, but they all merge finally into one.
